tasks.label: 1. Prepare Builder
tasks.command: cd build-image && docker build -t taha/wolfi-build-image:latest . && cd ../2-builder && pack builder create taha/wolfi-fips-builder:latest --config builder.toml

tasks.label: 4. Run App
tasks.command: docker rm -f fips-app-container || true && docker run -d -p 8080:8080 --name fips-app-container taha/spring-boot-fips-app
